title: GitHub Actions Cache Entry
description: Represents a cached dependency entry in GitHub Actions.

id.description: Unique identifier of the cache entry.

ref.description: The Git reference for the cache entry.

key.description: The cache key used to identify the cache entry.

version.description: The version of the cache entry.

last_accessed_at.description: The date and time the cache was last accessed.

created_at.description: The date and time the cache was created.

size_in_bytes.description: The size of the cache entry in bytes.
